name: agent_capability_phase52_windows_production_matrix
prompt: Please run the Phase52 Windows Computer Use production matrix acceptance and confirm that Phase43 through Phase51 are all covered.
prompt_lines: Please run one Phase 52 Windows Computer Use production matrix acceptance. Use only the project terminal self-check command. Do not click the real desktop, do not move the mouse, and do not type into any other real window. The final answer must include the fixed marker: PHASE52_WINDOWS_PRODUCTION_MATRIX_READY.

You must call the terminal tool and run this safe verification command: $env:PYTHONPATH='..'; python -c "from learning_agent.computer_use_mcp_v2.windows_runtime.production_matrix import main; raise SystemExit(main())"

Do not write the final answer early. Only after the terminal command prints PHASE52_WINDOWS_PRODUCTION_MATRIX_OK, the final answer's last line must completely copy: PHASE52_WINDOWS_PRODUCTION_MATRIX_READY PHASE52_WINDOWS_PRODUCTION_MATRIX_OK phase_count=9 native_capability=true native_host=true screenshot_runtime=true uia_tree=true sendinput_dispatcher=true security_policy=true tool_surface=true recovery_runtime=true status_ui=true dispatcher_actions_expanded=true actions_expanded=false
